positive: A stylized, minimal, and highly detailed geometric depiction of a serene crescent moon cradling a stylized constellation of eight stars. The stars are rendered as interconnected, brightly colored abstract orbs with faint glowing trails, set against a deep indigo midnight sky gradient. The overall design should be suitable for a sophisticated, high-contrast apparel print, featuring clean black outlines and vibrant, jewel-toned accents (sapphire blue, emerald green, rich gold). Emphasize sharp edges, symmetry, and a balanced, central composition. Use a distressed cosmic watercolor style blended with sharp vector line art, ensuring the final output has excellent color separation and punchiness.
